content.en:
There are more than 4,000 territories, and there are even more extradimensional realms here.

However, if you look down at those extradimensional realms from the tenth dimension, you will find that one by one the extradimensional realms burst like bubbles, and countless living beings were annihilated in an instant.

The headquarters of many forces are also like paper paste, easily torn apart.

A top-notch Fourth Realm originally thought that he could survive under the power of the Death Tribulation, but no matter how the other party operated the Innate Multidimensional Dao Body, he was still obliterated by the Death Tribulation.

Only a very small number of the Fourth Realm survived on their own, and most of them needed to use the formations arranged by the Fifth Realm or survive under the protection of the Fifth Realm.

Gradually, the death tribulation power subsided, and the death void was filled with terrifying death calamity power everywhere, and the extradimensional realms here were almost destroyed, and only a few extradimensional realms barely existed under the large array of overlord-level extradimensional forces.

After being quelled, the destructive power of the Death Tribulation Power is not as great as it was at the beginning, but the ordinary Fourth Realm is also untouchable, and only the Fourth Realm of the Tianguan-level combat power can barely survive or prepare a talisman against the Death Tribulation Power.

Territory No. 533.

Ye Tian saw that the death tribulation power had subsided, and then sensed that there was nothing wrong with the human race inside the Thirteen Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Supreme Treasure Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, so he breathed a sigh of relief~ .

Immediately, he put away the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, protected this innate multi-dimensional treasure at all times, and then found a place to hide it.

His other replica bodies were scattered across more than 4,000 realms, waiting for the opportunity to come to the multidimensional tribulation of death.

This kind of death multi-dimensional tribulation has a lot of opportunities to be born, and he naturally wants to use this opportunity to continue to improve his strength, and even does not hesitate to compete with the Sixth Realm for resources.

And he also has to send a copy body to the eleventh dimension, the eleventh dimension also has a lot of resources, and he can't go there usually, but now under the influence of the death multidimensional tribulation, the fifth realm can also go to the eleventh dimension.

It's just that where does the normal fifth realm dare to go to the eleventh dimension!

But Ye Tian dares!

The resources of the eleventh dimension are very good, and there is even hope to find resources suitable for cultivation in the sixth realm, but this kind of resources must be extremely rare, after all, the eleventh dimension also has the sixth realm multi-dimensional life, even if there are not many of them, but they will also collect resources, and many resources will inevitably be taken away by them.

Therefore, even if he entered the eleventh dimension, Ye Tian did not expect to be able to obtain a large number of resources, and could only strive to find some resources that the sixth realm multidimensional life could not look up to.

Those resources that he can't look down on may also be extremely precious to him.

Swish!

The reason why he didn't use the Fifth Realm Multi-dimensional Life Replica Body to enter here was that the Fifth Realm Multi-dimensional Life dared to enter the Eleventh Dimension, and it didn't necessarily end well, and it was still easy to be attacked by the Sixth Realm Multi-dimensional Life.

Therefore, he simply came in with his own copy body, so that the strength he exerted was still extremely strong, comparable to the weaker Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life.

"The suppression of the Eleventh Dimension is powerful, but it's nothing to me. "

Ye Tian cautiously shuttled through the eleventh dimension.

Time passed slowly, and during this period, as long as Ye Tian sensed the breath of the sixth realm's multi-dimensional life, he fled directly.

And he hid his aura, some Sixth Realm multidimensional beings would not really hunt him down, and only a very small number of Sixth Realm multidimensional beings would hunt him down.

this day.

Ye Tian had encountered a sixth-realm multidimensional life with cramps in his head, and had been chasing him.

This Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life is the Void Jinpeng in the Multidimensional Life, known for its speed, even Ye Tian is far inferior to this Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life in terms of speed.

Moreover, the other party is also in charge of the six-dimensional rule.

If Ye Tian mastered the Five Realms Supreme Skill such as the Ten Dimensional Void Technique, he could instantly cross the long territory, and he could greatly increase his speed, so that he could get rid of this Void Golden Peng again and again.

Escape!

Escape!

Keep running!

Ye Tian's cultivation was still low, even if it was the Five Realms and Ten Dimensional Void Technique, he still couldn't get rid of the Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life like the Void Jinpeng.

Eventually, he was caught up.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian and this Void Golden Pengdi were killed, and after only a few moves, he was hit hard.

However, this Void Golden Peng didn't actually kill him, but grabbed his copy body.

Seeing this, Ye Tian did not immediately dissolve this replica body, but wanted to follow the Void Jinpeng to see what the Void Jinpeng wanted to do.

I saw that the Void Jinpeng grabbed Ye Tian away, shuttled quickly, and soon came to an area of the eleventh dimension.

Then.

Void Jinpeng spoke: "Little guy, you enter here, take out something for me, and I'll let you go!"

"Void Jinpeng, what do you want me to take?"

Ye Tian frowned.

Void Jinpeng said coldly: "This is the inheritance land of an invincible existence in the sixth realm, after the fall of the other party, the inheritance land was left in the eleventh dimension, and I found it." However, multi-dimensional beings are not allowed to enter here, and only practitioners of the fifth realm are allowed to enter. I have been grasping for countless years, and I have caught some cultivators of the Fifth Realm, but they all failed and fell inside. It just so happens that your strength makes me very satisfied, with the invincible strength of the fifth realm, maybe you can bring the treasure out to me from inside. "

Only then did Ye Tian understand the plan of the Void Jinpeng, which was to let him enter here to obtain the treasure.

However, isn't Void Jinpeng afraid that he will hide inside all the time and not come out?

Perhaps, he will cultivate to the sixth realm here, and then there will be hope that the Void Jinpeng will take him down?

But soon, he knew why the Void Golden Wings were not afraid.

I saw a golden wheel mark fly out from the center of the Void Jinpeng eyebrows, and this golden wheel mark went directly into the depths of Ye Tian's soul will, locking his soul origin.

"If you dare to obtain the treasure and not come out, this Void Golden Wheel Mark will directly annihilate your soul origin and kill it!"

Void Jinpeng threatened.

And it also gave Ye Tian a time limit, that is, 100 million extra-dimensional eras, if Ye Tian's 100 million extra-dimensional epochs still don't come out, then the Void Golden Peng will launch the Void Golden Wheel Mark and annihilate Ye Tianwu.
